title: POHCA Resuscitation: Evaluation of IM Epinephrine

skipped_criteria: Must be receiving at least 1 minute of CPR by trained first responders (police, fire, or paramedic services) — no schema field exists for CPR duration or responder type.
Age lower bound of '1 day' cannot be distinguished from age_years=0 which also covers newborns under 1 day; the sub-year age granularity is not supported by the integer age_years field.

Exclusion of OHCA due to 'obvious traumatic event' is partially covered by the mechanism exclusion list, but the schema's cardiac_arrest mechanism on inclusion and the overlap with traumatic mechanisms cannot be fully disambiguated when trauma precipitates cardiac arrest.
